__nota: Diccionario inglés indexado por el texto español de origen. Lo que falte cae al español.
Día de recuperación. Si quieres, elige u: Recovery day. If you want, pick a session and train anyway.
Una sesión a RPE 9 o más: A session at RPE 9 or more
Entrena cada una de tus sesiones: Train every one of your sessions
Entrena un sábado o domingo: Train on a Saturday or Sunday
Tras 3 meses de parón y con molestia lum: After a 3-month break and with lower-back discomfort: 2x frequency per muscle group, spinal load spread out, every session with a specific core/lower-back block.
Recuperar patrones, despertar musculatur: Rebuild movement patterns, wake up the muscles, no brutal soreness
Aumentar carga, introducir cargas axiale: Increase load, add axial loading if the lower back is fine
Descanso o cardio ligero (60 min bici /: Rest or light cardio (60 min bike / walk)
Si un día no puedes, mantén el orden: nu: If you miss a day, keep the order: never do two Lowers in a row.
Para cuando no hay gym: habitación, parq: For when there's no gym: room, park or hotel. They count for your streak too.
Marca el calentamiento para empezar: Check off the warm-up to start
Peso total que quieres levantar (kg): Total weight you want to lift (kg)
El objetivo pesa menos que la barra: usa: Target weighs less than the bar: use a lighter bar or dumbbells.
en las recetas que vayas comiendo ↓: on the recipes as you eat them ↓
¿Comes fuera hoy? Juega con ventaja: Eating out today? Play it smart
recetas · pulsa + para registrar lo que: recipes · tap + to log what you eat
Recetas calibradas para tu fase · 2250 k: Recipes calibrated for your phase · 2250 kcal · 175P / 230C / 70G. Turn on the phase filter to see only your current phase.
Bowl proteico de skyr, avena y frutos ro: Protein skyr bowl with oats and berries
Tortilla de claras con espinacas y tosta: Egg-white omelette with spinach and rye toast
Overnight oats con proteína, manzana y c: Protein overnight oats with apple and cinnamon

Tostadas de centeno con salmón ahumado y: Rye toast with smoked salmon and fresh cheese
Yogur griego con plátano, granola y semi: Greek yogurt with banana, granola and chia seeds
Revuelto de tofu con pimiento y pan de s: Tofu scramble with pepper and seeded bread
Pollo al limón con arroz integral y bróc: Lemon chicken with brown rice and broccoli
Salmón al horno con boniato y espárragos: Baked salmon with sweet potato and asparagus
Curry ligero de pollo con arroz basmati: Light chicken curry with basmati rice and spinach
Merluza al horno con patata cocida y ens: Baked hake with boiled potato and chickpea salad
Ternera magra salteada con quinoa y pimi: Lean beef stir-fry with quinoa and peppers
Pollo al horno con lentejas y verduras a: Baked chicken with lentils and roasted veg
Merluza al papillote con verduras y quin: Hake en papillote with veg and quinoa
Pechuga de pavo al horno con boniato y j: Baked turkey breast with sweet potato and green beans
Tortilla de claras con champiñones y que: Egg-white omelette with mushrooms and fresh cheese
Dorada al horno con patata panadera y to: Baked sea bream with sliced potato and tomato
Wok de gambas con fideos de arroz y verd: Prawn wok with rice noodles and veg
Muslo de pollo sin piel con arroz integr: Skinless chicken thigh with brown rice and broccoli
Quark con pepino, eneldo y galletas de a: Quark with cucumber, dill and rice cakes
Jamón de pavo con zanahorias y hummus: Turkey ham with carrots and hummus
Plátano con yogur griego y miel: Banana with Greek yogurt and honey
Tostada integral con plátano y mantequil: Whole-grain toast with banana and peanut butter
Avena cocida con leche y naranja: Cooked oats with milk and orange
Tortas de arroz con plátano y miel: Rice cakes with banana and honey
Batido de whey con plátano y avena: Whey shake with banana and oats
Skyr con plátano y miel (versión rápida): Skyr with banana and honey (quick version)
Pechuga de pollo con arroz blanco (comid: Chicken breast with white rice (quick post-workout meal)
Requesón con frutos rojos y galletas de: Cottage cheese with berries and rice cakes
Lo esencial primero (proteína y creatina: Essentials first (protein and creatine) plus a couple of add-ons that make sense for you: Berlin with little sunlight and your focus on the lower back and recovery. Nothing magic: diet and sleep rule.
Qué tomar y cuándo · marca lo tomado: What to take and when · check off what you've taken
Se reinicia cada día y queda registrado: Resets each day and is logged for the trainer's report.
A cualquier hora, TODOS los días (tambié: Any time, EVERY day (rest days too)
El suplemento más probado: más fuerza, m: The most proven supplement: more strength, more training volume and better recovery. Daily consistency is what counts, not timing.
Post-entreno o cuando te cueste llegar a: Post-workout or when you struggle to reach 175 g of protein
Herramienta práctica para cerrar tu obje: A practical tool to hit your daily protein goal and preserve muscle in a deficit. Not required if you get there with food.
2000 UI al día (1000-4000 según analític: 2000 IU per day (1000-4000 per blood test)
Por la mañana, con una comida con algo d: In the morning, with a meal that has some fat
En Berlín hay poca luz solar gran parte: Berlin gets little sunlight much of the year and deficiency is very common. It affects bone, strength, testosterone, immune system and mood.
Apoyo antiinflamatorio para articulacion: Anti-inflammatory support for joints and recovery (useful for your lower back), heart and brain health. Useful if you don't eat oily fish 2-3 times/week.
Ayuda a la relajación muscular y a la ca: Helps muscle relaxation and sleep quality (key for recovering lower-back tension). Bisglycinate is gentler on the stomach.
Mejora rendimiento, fuerza y foco. Un ca: Improves performance, strength and focus. A coffee works. Careful in the afternoon so you don't wreck your sleep.
En días sin entreno: mantén la creatina: On rest days: keep the creatine (any time), vitamin D and magnesium. Whey only if you don't hit your protein.
175 g/día es mucho si no estás acostumbr: 175 g/day is a lot if you're not used to it. The easy way: 30–40 g per main meal (4 meals) + 1 protein shake/snack.
Reglas que funcionan sin contar nada: Rules that work without counting anything
Pide algo donde la proteína sea protagon: Order something where protein is the star. Palm-sized + 50%.
Carbohidrato del tamaño de tu puño: Carbs the size of your fist
Arroz, patatas, pan — un puño, ni más ni: Rice, potatoes, bread — one fist, no more no less.
Las salsas tienen el 80% de las calorías: Sauces hold 80% of the hidden calories.
No fries + salad on the side.
Bún (sin freír) o arroz al vapor + curry: Bún (not fried) or steamed rice + chicken or tofu curry.
Durum sin salsa cremosa, o iskender pequ: Dürüm without creamy sauce, or a small iskender.
Evita döner con salsa de yogur a tope; p: Avoid döner drowned in yogurt sauce; ask for grilled chicken with salad.
Para lo que no está en el recetario: com: For what's not in the recipe book: eating out, cravings or unweighed dishes. Trainer estimates — a rough log beats an unlogged day.
Los tamaños ajustan los macros: pequeño: Size adjusts the macros: small ×0.7 · large ×1.35. If unsure between two, pick the large: better to overestimate in a deficit.
Si el plato no está arriba, estímalo con: If the dish isn't above, estimate it with your hand: the method trainers use when there's no scale.
pollo, pescado, tofu, carne — una palma: chicken, fish, tofu, meat — one palm (thickness included)
arroz, pasta, pan, patata — un puño cerr: rice, pasta, bread, potato — one closed fist
aceite, queso, frutos secos, salsas — un: oil, cheese, nuts, sauces — one whole thumb
¿Qué era? (opcional, p. ej. «curry del t: What was it? (optional, e.g. 'curry from the Thai place')
Para días de cero ganas de pensar: un re: For days with zero will to think: a rough log beats none.
ensalada con proteína, sopa + plato pequ: salad with protein, soup + small dish
principal + entrante o postre, comida co: main + starter or dessert, a big meal
Peso, medidas y sensaciones en 2 minutos: Weight, measurements and how you feel in 2 minutes
Registra al menos 2 pesajes para ver la: Log at least 2 weigh-ins to see the curve.
tendencia (media 7 días): fíate de esta: trend (7-day average): trust this line, not the daily weigh-in.
Si baja varias semanas seguidas sin esta: If it drops several weeks in a row outside a deload, time to review the plan.
Manda las capturas de la báscula al chat: Send the scale screenshots to the trainer chat and these charts update on their own.
Con la siguiente medición se dibuja la c: The curve draws with the next reading.
Frontal y lateral, misma luz y misma pos: Front and side, same light and same pose. They never leave your phone (not in the .json backup).
Tap two photos to compare them.
Registra este ejercicio en 2+ sesiones p: Log this exercise in 2+ sessions to see the curve.
Your workouts will show up here.
Mismo momento siempre: al levantarte, de: Same moment every time: after waking, after the bathroom, before breakfast.
Medidas (opcional — con que las apuntes: Measurements (optional — once a week is plenty)
La cintura es la que más cuenta para la: Waist matters most for recomp: at navel height, without sucking in.
O más fácil: mándale las capturas de la: Or easier: send the scale screenshots to the trainer in chat and he enters all the data.
Energía, sueño, hambre, agujetas, lumbar: Energy, sleep, hunger, soreness, lower back, mood… whatever you want your trainer to know.
Esto sale en el Excel del entrenador y a: This shows up in the trainer's Excel and helps adjust the plan. Even two words.
Actívate un recordatorio semanal en Reco: Set yourself a weekly reminder in Reminders
Recuerda: fíate de la tendencia semanal,: Remember: trust the weekly trend, not a single day's number.
Mismo formato que tu hoja de seguimiento: Same format as your tracking sheet · Weigh-ins, Workouts and Nutrition
Genera datos entrenando y registrando pa: Generate data by training and logging to see your report.
Everything is saved on this phone.
Genera un Excel con el mismo formato que: Generates an Excel in the same format as your tracking sheet (Weigh-ins, Workouts, Nutrition). Download it and bring it to the chat to review the plan.
Open this site in Chrome on your Android.
Ábrela desde el icono: pantalla completa: Open it from the icon: full screen and works offline.
Permiso denegado. Actívalo en los ajuste: Permission denied. Enable it in your browser settings.
Your browser doesn't support notifications. Install the app to your home screen and use Chrome on Android.
Los horarios de suplementos siguen el pr: Supplement times follow the protocol in the Supplements section. Adjust them to your routine.
Tu sesión de hoy te espera. ¡Vamos!: Today's session is waiting. Let's go!
5 g de creatina y tu batido post-entreno: 5 g of creatine and your post-workout shake.
¿Vas por buen camino con los 3 L de agua: On track with your 3 L of water?
5 min: psoas, gato-vaca, rotaciones. Sob: 5 min: psoas, cat-cow, rotations. Especially if there was shibari today.
Pésate y apunta tus medidas: 2 minutos y: Weigh in and note your measurements: 2 minutes and done.
Fijar cuándo empiezas el plan: Set when you start the plan
¿Qué día empiezas (o empezaste) el plan?: What day do you start (or did you start) the plan?
Las semanas, las fases y el recetario se: Weeks, phases and recipes adjust to this date.
Tap a day to choose what you train.
Ya tienes un entreno registrado este día: You already have a workout logged on this day. ✓
kg por lado que no salen con discos está: kg per side that don't come out with standard plates — that's the nearest reachable weight below.
Hazlo siempre, no es opcional con tu lum: Always do it, not optional with your lower back. Slow bird-dogs and dead bugs, bracing your core as if about to take a punch: they teach the core to stabilise the spine.
5 min, ritmo cómodo, subir temperatura: 5 min, comfortable pace, raise body temperature
Cat-cow x8, T-spine rotation x5 por lado: Cat-cow x8, T-spine rotation x5 per side
Glute bridge x12, monster walk con banda: Glute bridge x12, monster walk with band x10 per direction
Dead bug x8 por lado, bird-dog x8 por la: Dead bug x8 per side, bird-dog x8 per side (slow)
También de viaje el calentamiento es obl: Even when travelling the warm-up is mandatory: your lower back travels with you. Everything is done on the room floor.
Marcha en el sitio o jumping jacks suave: Marching in place or gentle jumping jacks
x12, aprieta arriba 2 s: x12, squeeze at the top for 2 s
Si el mini-gym tiene bici o cinta, 5 min: If the mini-gym has a bike or treadmill, 5 easy min count as the first step. Your lower back travels with you.
Cardio suave o marcha en el sitio: Easy cardio or marching in place
Cualquier dolor punzante, hormigueo o do: Any sharp pain, tingling or pain radiating to the leg = stop and return to the no-barbell version. Mild muscle tension after exercise = normal.
10 min elíptica o cinta inclinada en zon: 10 min elliptical or incline treadmill in zone 2
10 min bici suave para drenar piernas: 10 min easy bike to flush the legs
Caminata de 20–30 min si el día lo permi: 20–30 min walk if the day allows
Caminata de 20–30 min, ideal para conoce: 20–30 min walk, ideal for exploring the city
10 min de la máquina que haya, zona 2: 10 min on whatever machine is available, zone 2
Mejor que barra al volver, controla mejo: Better than barbell coming back, better shoulder control
Anti-rotación, clave para tu lumbar: Anti-rotation, key for your lower back
Sustituye a la barra estas 2 semanas: Replaces the barbell for these 2 weeks
Pies a la altura del pecho, no muy abajo: Feet at chest height, not too low
Si haces dominadas libres, bájalas a 5 r: If doing unassisted pull-ups, drop to 5 reps
Cuida la lumbar evitando remo libre: Protect your lower back by avoiding free-standing rows
Arranca con peso moderado, técnica antes: Start with moderate weight, technique before load
Bisagra de cadera, NO sentadilla. Espald: Hip hinge, NOT a squat. Neutral spine always
Pie atrás en banco, foco glúteo: Rear foot on bench, glute focus
= press banca. Si llegas fácil a 12, pon: = bench press. If 12 is easy, wear a loaded backpack or slow the descent to 3 s
= press inclinado. Pies elevados, cuerpo: = incline press. Feet elevated, body in a plank
= press militar. Cadera alta, cabeza ent: = overhead press. Hips high, head between your arms
= row. Sturdy table or sheet in door. Body in a plank
= remo mancuerna. Mochila cargada, apoyo: = dumbbell row. Loaded backpack, support on chair, neutral spine
= tríceps en polea. Hombros abajo, codos: = cable tricep. Shoulders down, elbows back
= goblet. Mochila abrazada al pecho, baj: = goblet squat. Backpack hugged to chest, controlled descent
= búlgara del gym. Pie atrás en sofá o c: = gym Bulgarian split squat. Rear foot on sofa or bed, glute focus
Tronco erguido, paso mediano. Mochila si: Upright torso, medium stride. Add backpack if easy
Silla firme contra la pared. Sube empuja: Sturdy chair against the wall. Push up with the heel
= hip thrust. Espalda alta apoyada, sube: = hip thrust. Upper back supported, drive up with the glute
2 s de pausa arriba. Mochila sobre la ca: 2 s pause at the top. Backpack over hips if easy
Rango completo, bajada lenta. A 1 pierna: Full range, slow descent. Single leg if easy
Lento y controlado, lumbar pegada al sue: Slow and controlled, lower back pressed to floor
La misma de tu Lower A: The same as your Lower A
= press banca. Si hay banco, mejor en ba: = bench press. Use a bench if there is one
Apoyada en banco o cama firme, espalda n: Supported on bench or firm bed, neutral spine
Bisagra de cadera, espalda neutra SIEMPR: Hip hinge, neutral spine ALWAYS. Conservative travel weight
Sentada con respaldo si hay banco: Seated with back support if there's a bench
Peso ligero, sin balanceo, codos blandos: Light weight, no swinging, soft elbows
Sentadilla con barra en vez de goblet (L: Barbell squat instead of goblet (Lower A): start with empty bar + light load, 4x8.
Peso muerto rumano con barra (Lower B):: Barbell Romanian deadlift (Lower B): 4x8, conservative weight.
Sube a 4 series en compuestos (sem 3–4),: Move to 4 sets on compounds (wk 3–4), then 5x5 on main lifts (wk 5–6).
Reduce reps: 8–10 en compuestos, 10–12 e: Drop the reps: 8–10 on compounds, 10–12 on accessories.
Progresión: +2,5–5 kg en compuestos cada: Progression: +2.5–5 kg on compounds each week if you complete all reps with good technique.
Baja a 3–6 reps en compuestos para fuerz: Drop to 3–6 reps on compounds for pure strength.
Introduce drop sets en el último ejercic: Add drop sets on the last exercise and rest-pause on accessories.
Si todo va bien, peso muerto convenciona: If all is well, conventional deadlift in Lower B with moderate loads.
Semana 11: mismas sesiones, 60% del peso: Week 11: same sessions, 60% of the weight, 2 sets per exercise.
Semana 12: medir peso, fuerza, sensacion: Week 12: measure weight, strength, how you feel and plan the next block.
